info.name: School Management API
info.description:
Postman collection for the School Management Node.js API.

**Base URL**: Set the `baseUrl` variable to your deployed URL or `http://localhost:3000` for local testing.

variable.description: Change this to your deployed server URL

request.description: Verifies the API server is running and lists available endpoints.

Adds a new school to the database.

**Required fields**: `name`, `address`, `latitude`, `longitude`

response.name: 201 Created — School Added

request.description: Demonstrates validation errors when required fields are missing or invalid.

response.name: 400 Bad Request — Validation Failed

request.description: Validates that latitude is between -90 and 90, longitude between -180 and 180.

response.name: 400 Bad Request — Invalid Coordinates

request.description:
Fetches all schools from the database and returns them sorted by distance from the user's given coordinates.

Distance is calculated using the **Haversine formula** and expressed in kilometres.

response.name: 200 OK — Schools Sorted by Distance
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Schools fetched and sorted by proximity.",
  "user_location": {
    "latitude": 28.6139,
    "longitude": 77.209
  },
  "total": 3,
  "data": [
    {

      "name": "Kendriya Vidyalaya",

      "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z",

    },

request.description: Demonstrates validation error when latitude/longitude query params are not provided.

response.name: 400 Bad Request — Missing Coordinates
